metadata.name: sss
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard - Modular stablecoin program with SSS-1 and SSS-2 presets

instructions.name: accept_authority_transfer
docs: Accept a pending authority transfer. Must be signed by the proposed new authority.

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: The proposed new authority — must sign to confirm acceptance.

instructions.name: add_to_blacklist
docs: Add an address to the blacklist. Requires Blacklister role.
Only available on SSS-2 configs (transfer hook enabled).

instructions.name: assign_role
docs: Assign a new role to a user. Master authority only.

instructions.name: burn_tokens
docs: Burn tokens. Requires Burner role.

accounts.name: from_token_account
docs: Token account to burn from. The burner must be the owner or delegate,
which is enforced by the Token-2022 program during the burn CPI.

instructions.name: cancel_authority_transfer
docs: Cancel a pending authority transfer. Master authority only.

instructions.name: freeze_token_account
docs: Freeze a token account. Requires Pauser role.

accounts.name: token_account
docs: Token account to freeze, validated to belong to the correct mint and token program.

instructions.name: get_config
docs: Return the full stablecoin configuration.

instructions.name: get_minter_info
docs: Return quota statistics for a specific minter: quota, minted, remaining.

instructions.name: get_supply_info
docs: Return supply statistics: total_minted, total_burned, current_supply, supply_cap.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize a new stablecoin with Token-2022 extensions.
SSS-1: basic mint with metadata.
SSS-2: adds permanent delegate + transfer hook for compliance.

instructions.name: is_blacklisted
docs: Return whether an address is on the blacklist.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The blacklist entry PDA. May or may not exist.
discriminator manually to determine whether the address is blacklisted.

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mint tokens to a recipient. Requires Minter role and available quota.

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: Recipient's token account, validated to belong to the correct mint and token program.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Pause the stablecoin (blocks minting and burning). Requires Pauser role.

instructions.name: preview_mint
docs: Simulate whether a mint of `amount` would succeed, without modifying state.

instructions.name: propose_authority_transfer
docs: Propose a 2-step authority transfer. The new authority must call
`accept_authority_transfer` to complete the handoff.

instructions.name: remove_from_blacklist
docs: Remove an address from the blacklist. Requires Blacklister role.
Closes the BlacklistEntry PDA and returns rent.

instructions.name: reset_minter_quota
docs: Reset a minter's cumulative `minted` counter to zero.
Allows the minter to issue up to their full quota again. Master authority only.

instructions.name: seize
docs: Seize tokens from an account using the permanent delegate.
Requires Seizer role and permanent delegate enabled.

accounts.name: blacklisted_owner
docs: The wallet owner being seized from (must match from_token_account.owner).

accounts.name: from_token_account
docs: Source token account to seize from, validated to belong to the correct mint.

accounts.name: to_token_account
docs: Destination token account (e.g., treasury), validated to belong to the correct mint.

instructions.name: thaw_token_account
docs: Thaw a frozen token account. Requires Pauser role.

accounts.name: token_account
docs: Token account to thaw, validated to belong to the correct mint and token program.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Transfer master authority to a new address (immediate, emergency path).

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Unpause the stablecoin. Requires Pauser role.

instructions.name: update_minter
docs: Set or update a minter's quota. Master authority only.

instructions.name: update_role
docs: Activate or deactivate an existing role. Master authority only.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized - caller lacks the required role

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Stablecoin is paused

errors.name: NotPaused
errors.msg: Stablecoin is not paused

errors.name: QuotaExceeded
errors.msg: Minter quota exceeded

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name exceeds maximum length

errors.name: SymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Symbol exceeds maximum length

errors.name: UriTooLong
errors.msg: URI exceeds maximum length

errors.name: ReasonTooLong
errors.msg: Reason exceeds maximum length

errors.name: InvalidRole
errors.msg: Invalid role type

errors.name: ComplianceNotEnabled
errors.msg: Compliance features not enabled on this stablecoin (SSS-1 config)

errors.name: PermanentDelegateNotEnabled
errors.msg: Permanent delegate not enabled on this stablecoin

errors.name: AlreadyBlacklisted
errors.msg: Address is already blacklisted

errors.name: NotBlacklisted
errors.msg: Address is not blacklisted

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid authority - not the master authority

errors.name: SameAuthority
errors.msg: Cannot transfer authority to the same address

errors.name: InvalidDecimals
errors.msg: Invalid decimals - must be between 0 and 9

errors.name: InvalidConfig
errors.msg: Invalid configuration: transfer hook requires a valid program ID

errors.name: SupplyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Global supply cap would be exceeded by this mint

errors.name: PendingTransferExists
errors.msg: An authority transfer is already in progress — cancel or accept first

errors.name: NoPendingTransfer
errors.msg: No authority transfer is in progress

errors.name: InvalidPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Only the proposed pending authority may accept the transfer

types.name: AccountFrozen
docs: Emitted when a token account is frozen via [`freeze_token_account`](crate::sss::freeze_token_account).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: authority
docs: The pauser who froze the account.

fields.name: account
docs: The token account that was frozen.

types.name: AccountThawed
docs: Emitted when a token account is thawed via [`thaw_token_account`](crate::sss::thaw_token_account).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: authority
docs: The pauser who thawed the account.

fields.name: account
docs: The token account that was thawed.

types.name: AddressBlacklisted
docs: Emitted when an address is added to the blacklist via [`add_to_blacklist`](crate::sss::add_to_blacklist).
SSS-2 only — requires transfer hook to be enabled.

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: address
docs: The address that was blacklisted.

fields.name: reason
docs: The reason for blacklisting (e.g., "OFAC match").

fields.name: blacklisted_by
docs: The blacklister who added the entry.

types.name: AddressUnblacklisted
docs: Emitted when an address is removed from the blacklist via [`remove_from_blacklist`](crate::sss::remove_from_blacklist).
SSS-2 only. The [`BlacklistEntry`](crate::state::BlacklistEntry) PDA is closed
and rent is returned to the authority.

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: address
docs: The address that was removed from the blacklist.

fields.name: removed_by
docs: The blacklister who removed the entry.

types.name: AuthorityTransferAccepted
docs: Emitted when a 2-step authority transfer is completed via
[`accept_authority_transfer`](crate::sss::accept_authority_transfer).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: previous_authority
docs: The outgoing master authority.

fields.name: new_authority
docs: The new master authority (formerly `pending_authority`).

types.name: AuthorityTransferCancelled
docs: Emitted when a pending authority transfer is cancelled via
[`cancel_authority_transfer`](crate::sss::cancel_authority_transfer).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: cancelled_by
docs: The authority that cancelled the transfer.

fields.name: cleared_pending
docs: The pending authority that was cleared.

types.name: AuthorityTransferProposed
docs: Emitted when an authority transfer is proposed via
[`propose_authority_transfer`](crate::sss::propose_authority_transfer).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: current_authority
docs: The current master authority proposing the transfer.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: The proposed new master authority.

fields.name: proposed_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the proposal was created.

types.name: AuthorityTransferred
docs: Emitted when master authority is transferred via [`transfer_authority`](crate::sss::transfer_authority).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: previous_authority
docs: The outgoing master authority.

fields.name: new_authority
docs: The incoming master authority.

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: Records that an address is on the blacklist (SSS-2 only).
The transfer hook program checks for the existence of this PDA to block
transfers involving blacklisted addresses. When removed, the PDA is closed
via `close = authority` and rent is returned.
Seeds: `["blacklist", config_pubkey, address_pubkey]`

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config

fields.name: address
docs: The blacklisted address

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason for blacklisting (max 64 chars)

fields.name: blacklisted_at
docs: Timestamp when blacklisted

fields.name: blacklisted_by
docs: Authority who blacklisted the address

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: ConfigInfo
docs: Returned by [`get_config`](crate::sss::get_config).

types.name: InitializeParams
docs: Parameters for initializing a new stablecoin.
Passed to [`initialize`](crate::sss::initialize). Feature flags are immutable
after initialization — choose SSS-1 (all disabled) or SSS-2 (delegate + hook
enabled) at creation time.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable name (max 32 bytes).

fields.name: symbol
docs: Token ticker symbol (max 10 bytes).

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI pointing to off-chain JSON (max 200 bytes).

fields.name: decimals
docs: Decimal places for the token (0–9).

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Enable the permanent delegate extension (required for seize, SSS-2).

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Enable the transfer hook extension (required for blacklist enforcement, SSS-2).

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether newly created token accounts default to a frozen state.

fields.name: enable_confidential_transfer
docs: Enable confidential transfers via Token-2022 ConfidentialTransferMint extension (SSS-3).

fields.name: transfer_hook_program_id
docs: The transfer hook program ID. Required when `enable_transfer_hook` is true.

fields.name: supply_cap
docs: Global supply cap in base units. Set to 0 for unlimited supply.

types.name: MinterInfo
docs: Returned by [`get_minter_info`](crate::sss::get_minter_info).

fields.name: quota
docs: The maximum amount this minter may mint.

fields.name: minted
docs: Cumulative amount minted so far (may be reset by master authority).

fields.name: remaining
docs: Remaining quota (`quota - minted`).

types.name: MinterQuota
docs: Per-minter allowance tracking.
Each minter has an independent quota and a running total of tokens minted.
The master authority sets the `quota`; `minted` is incremented on each
[`mint_tokens`](crate::sss::mint_tokens) call and is never reset (preserves
audit history even when the quota is increased).
Seeds: `["minter_quota", config_pubkey, minter_pubkey]`

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter address

fields.name: quota
docs: Maximum amount the minter can mint

fields.name: minted
docs: Amount already minted

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: MinterQuotaReset
docs: Emitted when a minter's cumulative `minted` counter is reset via
[`reset_minter_quota`](crate::sss::reset_minter_quota).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter whose counter was reset.

fields.name: previous_minted
docs: The `minted` value before the reset.

fields.name: reset_by
docs: The master authority who triggered the reset.

types.name: MinterQuotaUpdated
docs: Emitted when a minter's quota is set or updated via [`update_minter`](crate::sss::update_minter).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter whose quota was updated.

fields.name: new_quota
docs: The new maximum mint quota (in base units).

fields.name: updated_by
docs: The master authority who made the change.

types.name: PreviewMintResult
docs: Returned by [`preview_mint`](crate::sss::preview_mint).

fields.name: would_succeed
docs: Whether the mint would succeed given current state.

fields.name: failure_reason
docs: Human-readable reason if `would_succeed` is false.

types.name: RoleAccount
docs: Tracks whether a user holds a specific role for a stablecoin.
One PDA per (config, role_type, user) triple. The `active` flag controls
whether the role is currently in effect — deactivated roles retain their PDA
so they can be re-activated without a new `init`.
Seeds: `["role", config_pubkey, role_type_u8, user_pubkey]`

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config this role belongs to

fields.name: user
docs: The user who has this role

fields.name: role_type
docs: Role type (0=Minter, 1=Burner, 2=Pauser, 3=Blacklister, 4=Seizer)

fields.name: active
docs: Whether the role is currently active

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: RoleUpdated
docs: Emitted when a role is assigned via [`assign_role`](crate::sss::assign_role)
or toggled via [`update_role`](crate::sss::update_role).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: user
docs: The user whose role was updated.

fields.name: role_type
docs: The role type (0=Minter, 1=Burner, 2=Pauser, 3=Blacklister, 4=Seizer).

fields.name: active
docs: Whether the role is now active (`true`) or revoked (`false`).

fields.name: updated_by
docs: The master authority who made the change.

types.name: StablecoinConfig
docs: Central configuration account for a stablecoin instance.
Created during [`initialize`](crate::sss::initialize) and owned by this program.
The config PDA also serves as the mint authority, freeze authority, and (if SSS-2)
permanent delegate for the Token-2022 mint.
Seeds: `["stablecoin", mint_pubkey]`

fields.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint address

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable name (max 32 chars)

fields.name: symbol
docs: Token symbol (max 10 chars)

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI (max 200 chars)

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token decimals

fields.name: master_authority
docs: Master authority that can assign roles

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether permanent delegate is enabled (required for seize)

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether transfer hook is enabled (required for blacklist enforcement)

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether new token accounts default to frozen state

fields.name: enable_confidential_transfer
docs: Whether confidential transfers are enabled (SSS-3 privacy preset)

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the stablecoin is paused

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Total tokens minted over lifetime

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Total tokens burned over lifetime

fields.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program ID (if enabled)

fields.name: supply_cap
docs: Global supply cap in base units (0 = unlimited).
Once total_minted reaches this value no further minting is allowed.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority in a 2-step authority transfer (Pubkey::default() = no transfer in flight).

fields.name: authority_transfer_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the authority transfer was proposed (0 = no transfer in flight).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved for future use

types.name: StablecoinInitialized
docs: Emitted when a new stablecoin is initialized via [`initialize`](crate::sss::initialize).

fields.name: config
docs: The newly created [`StablecoinConfig`](crate::state::StablecoinConfig) PDA.

fields.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint address.

fields.name: authority
docs: The master authority who initialized the stablecoin.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable name of the stablecoin.

fields.name: symbol
docs: Token ticker symbol.

fields.name: decimals
docs: Number of decimal places.

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether the permanent delegate extension is enabled (SSS-2).

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether the transfer hook extension is enabled (SSS-2).

fields.name: enable_confidential_transfer
docs: Whether confidential transfers are enabled (SSS-3).

types.name: StablecoinPaused
docs: Emitted when the stablecoin is paused via [`pause`](crate::sss::pause).
While paused, minting and burning are blocked.

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: authority
docs: The pauser who triggered the pause.

types.name: StablecoinUnpaused
docs: Emitted when the stablecoin is unpaused via [`unpause`](crate::sss::unpause).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: authority
docs: The pauser who triggered the unpause.

types.name: SupplyInfo
docs: Returned by [`get_supply_info`](crate::sss::get_supply_info).

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Cumulative tokens minted over the lifetime of this stablecoin.

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Cumulative tokens burned over the lifetime of this stablecoin.

fields.name: current_supply
docs: Current circulating supply (`total_minted - total_burned`).

fields.name: supply_cap
docs: Global supply cap (0 = unlimited).

types.name: TokensBurned
docs: Emitted when tokens are burned via [`burn_tokens`](crate::sss::burn_tokens).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: burner
docs: The burner who executed the burn operation.

fields.name: from
docs: The token account from which tokens were burned.

fields.name: amount
docs: The number of tokens burned (in base units).

types.name: TokensMinted
docs: Emitted when tokens are minted via [`mint_tokens`](crate::sss::mint_tokens).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter who executed the mint operation.

fields.name: recipient
docs: The recipient's token account that received the minted tokens.

fields.name: amount
docs: The number of tokens minted (in base units).

fields.name: minter_total_minted
docs: The minter's cumulative minted amount after this operation.

types.name: TokensSeized
docs: Emitted when tokens are seized via [`seize`](crate::sss::seize).
SSS-2 only — requires permanent delegate to be enabled. Uses the config PDA
as permanent delegate to execute a `transfer_checked` from the source to the
destination (typically a treasury account).

fields.name: config
docs: The stablecoin config PDA.

fields.name: from
docs: The token account from which tokens were seized.

fields.name: to
docs: The destination token account (e.g., treasury).

fields.name: amount
docs: The number of tokens seized (in base units).

fields.name: seized_by
docs: The seizer who executed the operation.
